description_long: This rifle features a robust black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by a distinctive wooden thumbhole stock with two large cutouts for reduced weight and improved ergonomics. The rifle is equipped with a prominent scope mounted on top, suggesting it is designed for precision shooting at distance. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard, and the trigger assembly is integrated into the lower receiver. The barrel is relatively long and capped with a cylindrical suppressor, indicating a focus on stealth or reduced muzzle flash. The overall design is reminiscent of classic designated marksman or sniper rifles, blending modern tactical elements with traditional wooden furniture. The visible surfaces are a mix of matte black metal and polished wood, giving the rifle a professional and functional appearance.
description: A black metal rifle with a wooden thumbhole stock, scope, detachable box magazine, and a suppressor on the barrel. The design blends tactical and traditional elements for precision shooting.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the suppressor and the narrow profile of the scope and barrel.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the wooden thumbhole stock, scope, magazine, and the full length of the suppressor.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the end of the wooden stock and the alignment of the scope and barrel.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the wooden stock, scope, magazine, and suppressor, with more detail on the stock cutouts.
